title: Availability Schedules
manageSchedules: Manage your availability schedules for classes and appointments

calendarDescription: Connect your calendar to automatically block times when you have existing appointments.

googleCalendarSync: Synchronize your Google Calendar to automatically detect and import available time slots
previewDescription: This is how your availability will appear to others.

errors.fetchCurrentAvailability: Failed to fetch current availability schedule

noIntegrationCalendars: No calendar connections found. Please connect your Google Calendar first.

errorAssigningUser: Error assigning user. Please try again.
errorStartTimeOverlap: Start time must be before end time.
errorEndTimeOverlap: End time must be after start time.
